headline: Celebrity Chef Cooks Meal So Expensive It Causes Three Countries To Declare Economic Emergency
summary: The 'Impossible Burger Deluxe Supreme' costs $500,000 per plate, requires a security detail to protect the truffle shavings.
fullBody: Celebrity chef Gordon Ramsey-Wha-tever has unveiled his latest culinary creation, the 'Impossible Burger Deluxe Supreme,' priced at a mere $500,000 per plate. The burger features a patty made from 'the rarest cow in existence,' cheese aged for 100 years, bread baked from wheat grown on a space station, and truffle shavings so expensive they require their own security detail. Three countries have declared economic emergencies after their citizens attempted to order the burger using government funds. The chef claims the meal is 'worth every penny, you absolute donkey,' and has installed metal detectors at his restaurant to ensure patrons aren't smuggling in their own condiments. The first customer to purchase the burger reportedly fainted upon seeing the price and is now being sued by the restaurant for emotional damages.
imagePrompt: A giant luxury burger with golden ingredients on a velvet pedestal, security guards surrounding it, shocked customers, comic illustration, flat design, gold and red colors
